questions.statement: In a certain code language, &#39;HUMP&#39; is written as &#39;GTLO&#39; and &#39;LIKE&#39; is written as &#39;KHJD&#39;. How will &#39;PLAY&#39; be written in that language?

<p>Which figure should replace the question mark (?) if the series were to be continued?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/24/01/F1_SSC_Arbaz_23-1-24_D1_v2.png" /></p>
<span style="">If a rope 84 m long is divided in the ratio 7 : 5, then the length of the longer piece (in m ) is:</span>

<p>Select the number that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series.</p>

<p>117, 98, 80, ?, 47, 32</p>

<p>How many triangles are there in the following figure?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/22/02/F1_Shubham%20V_20-1-22_Savita_D13.png" style="width: 160px; height: 159px;" /></p>

<p>The given Venn diagram shows the number of children in a complex who play a particular&nbsp;sport. How many children play Cricket as well as Chess?</p>

Surya is facing towards East direction, he then turns 45&deg; Clockwise and then 135&deg; Anticlockwise direction and then 90&deg; Clockwise direction. In which direction is he facing now?

<p>Select the option that is related to the fifth number in the same way as the second number is related to the first number and the fourth number is related to the third number.</p>

<p>16 : 38 :: 26 : 58 :: 37 : ?</p>
In a class of 52 children, Bilal&#39;s rank is 11th from the bottom. Salman is 9 ranks above Bilal. What is Salman&#39;s rank from the top?
In a certain code language, &lsquo;LIP&rsquo; is written as &lsquo;40&rsquo;, &lsquo;GILT&rsquo; is written as &lsquo;51&rsquo;. What is the code for &lsquo;ROPE&rsquo; in that code language?

<p><span data-darkreader-inline-color="">Two different positions of the same dice are shown</span> and the numbers 1 to 6 are inscribed on its six faces. Which number is on the opposite of the face which denotes the number &#39;2&#39;?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/20/06/F1_Resham.R_23-06-2020_Savita_D%2018.png" /></p>

In a certain code language, &ldquo;ABROAD&rdquo; is written as &ldquo;DROBAA&rdquo;, and &ldquo;ACTIVE&rdquo; is written as &ldquo;ETICAV&rdquo;. How will &ldquo;BISHOP&rdquo; be written in that language?

Janhvi starts walking from her home and goes 45 m towards the west. She then turns right and walks 32 m. Then, she turns right and walks 88 m. After that, she turns right and walks 50 m. Finally, she turns right again and walks 43 m. How far and in which direction is she now from her home? (All turns are 90 degree turns only)

<p>Which letter-cluster will replace the question mark (?) and complete the given series?</p>

<p>HERO, GISM, ?, EQUI, DUVG&nbsp;</p>

<p>How many black tables are there?</p>

Five friends Sohan, Mohan, Rohan, Ali and Salim like 5 different games i.e. Cricket, Kho-Kho, badminton, football and hockey, but not in the same order. Sohan likes football but does not like playing cricket. Ali and Rohan are best friends. Ali likes badminton and cricket is liked by Mohan. Who likes hockey?

<p>Which of the following interchanges of signs would make the given equation correct?</p>

<p>13 &times; 15&nbsp;&divide;&nbsp; 98 + 7 - 11 = 198</p>

<p>Select the figure from the options that can replace the question mark (?) and complete the pattern.<br />
<img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/23/07/F1_Vinanti_SSC_20.07.23_D1.png" style="width: 121px; height: 121px;" /></p>

In a certain code language, &#39;Milk are exhausting&#39; is coded as &#39;# tg 5&#39;, and &#39;Are water super milk&#39; is coded as &#39;pa 5 6 #&#39;. What is the code for &#39;super&#39; in that language?

30 people are standing in a queue facing north. Manoj is standing at the 11<sup>th</sup> position from the front. Shahin is standing at the 7<sup>th</sup> position from the back. Neeraj is standing exactly in front of Shahin. How many people are standing between Neeraj and Manoj?
S is shorter than N. P is taller than S. Q is taller than N but shorter than H. N is taller than P. Who will be exactly in the middle if they stand in a row according to height?

Diogo&rsquo;s house faces west. He steps out of his house and walks 22 m straight. He then turns to his left and walks 20 m. He takes another left turn and walks 25 m. Finally, he turns left once again and walks further for 24 m to reach his school. How far is the school from his house and in which direction with respect to his house?
